    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (architecture details in architecture and ablations section are out of scope).",

rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (architecture mismatch between experimental setup and architecture and ablations sections).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (architecture details in architecture and ablations section are out of scope).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (framing claims outrun what the reported evidence can support).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
